name: sulis-execution
description: Work Package Executor — three-layer architecture (per v0.9.0) plus plan-mode-style Step 1.5 plan generation (v0.10.0+). (1) deterministic CLI tool library (wpx-* scripts) handles all bookkeeping including the new wpx-journal seed-plan / mark-plan-item / add-plan-item subcommands; (2) executor agent owns Steps 1-7 (worktree → Step 1.5 plan generation → Red-Green-Blue → docs → lint → commit → push) and delegates bookkeeping to wpx-* tools; (3) calling session owns Steps 8-12 via wpx-pipeline background Bash, security-reviewer Agent spawn, and wpx-step12 atomic wrap. v0.10.2 fixes three correctness bugs in wpx-step12's sub-tool dispatcher surfaced by the first real-world v0.10.0 run on WP-10: (a) multi-line JSON parse — _call_tool was parsing only the LAST line of sub-tool stdout (which is the closing `}` of pretty-printed JSON), now parses the whole stdout; (b) atomic-failure semantics — _call_tool now propagates ok:false responses from sub-tools as fail-fast emit_error so partial state can't progress past a failed step; (c) --repo-root propagation — sub-tool invocations now pass paths.repo_root explicitly so wpx-step12 invoked from a non-project cwd resolves artifact paths correctly. v0.10.1 fixed the wpx-* tool discoverability gap (path-resolution preamble + wpx human wrapper). Self-heals in-scope failures via OODA + Five Whys per executor-loop-standard.md; escalates out-of-scope failures via structured BLOCKER records. Follows git-workflow-standard.md. Composes with CP-01..CP-05, AAF-01..AAF-09, EP-02/03/07, RGB-01..03.
